turns.speaker: recruiter
turns.text: Hi Aarav, I noticed your background in PostgreSQL, Django, Python and thought it mapped well to a Backend Engineer role we are hiring for. The team needs someone who can contribute quickly and still shape the technical direction.

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: Thanks, I am not actively looking, but the Backend Engineer scope does sound close to my work. My main questions would be timing, location flexibility, and how much ownership the role has.

turns.speaker: recruiter
turns.text: That makes sense. The role is based in Bengaluru, India hybrid and is strongest for someone with 5-8 years who can own delivery across PostgreSQL, Django, Python. I can share the team charter and compensation range before any formal interview.

turns.speaker: candidate
turns.text: I would be open to a short exploratory call if the team can share more detail on scope, growth path, and flexibility.
